results.title: Protesters block copper exports from Rio Tinto's Oyu Tolgoi mine in Mongolia
results.description: Protesters blocked copper exports from Rio Tinto's massive Oyu Tolgoi copper mine in Mongolia on Wednesday, threatening the supply of copper concentrate to China.
